SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-30-2013 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO SEP-26-2013 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. NO APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. CASE CONTINUED FOR PLAINTIFF BY SHEILA ROBLERO--SENIOR COLLECTIONS OFFICER. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,932.20 FILED BY C & C SF OFFICE OF TREASURER TAX COLLECTOR AS TO DEFENDANT JAIRAM, GHANSHAM ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-28-2013 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
